title: Apex Touch - watchOS App
description: An Apple Watch (WatchOS) app which gets connected to F1 25 game and shows real time telemetry data on your wrist along with haptic feedback for gear shifts and race events

title: What's over my head
description: A scanning tool that detects and displays real-time details of aircraft flying directly over your current location, utilizing live flight telemetry and coordinate mapping APIs.

title: Bull Bear Bonsai
description: A live-rendered 3D bonsai tree that reacts dynamically to real-time stock market indices, changing colors and shape based on market volatility and trends.
